lyrics.text: I was found on the ground by the fountain at Valder fields and was almost dry
lyrics.translation: 我躺在瓦尔德的田野中，靠在泉水旁被太阳晒得昏昏沉沉

lyrics.text: lying in the sun after I had tried
lying in the sun by the side
we had agreed that the council would end at three hours over time
lyrics.translation: 我们一致赞同议会将在三个小时后结束

lyrics.text: Shoelaces were tied at the traffic lights
lyrics.translation: 在红绿灯前我系了系鞋带

lyrics.text: I was running late, could apply
lyrics.translation: 虽然还是迟到了，可我想我还能行的
如果在百货商店最好不过了

lyrics.text: they said there would be delays
lyrics.translation: 无非是拖着几天工资而已
我也知道，这不是长久之计
如果在百货商店最好不过了

lyrics.text: They said there would be delays
lyrics.translation: 无非是拖着几天工资而已
我也知道，这不是长久之计

lyrics.text: She was found on the ground in a gown made at Valder fields and was sound asleep
lyrics.translation: 她躺在瓦尔德的田野中，穿着精美的定制礼服安稳地睡着了

lyrics.text: Stairs above the door to the man who cried
lyrics.translation: 门外台阶上哭着的那个男人

lyrics.text: When he said that he loved his life
lyrics.translation: 说他曾真的很热爱生活

lyrics.text: We had agreed that the council should take his keys to the bedroom door
lyrics.translation: 我们一致赞成应该拿走他房门的钥匙

lyrics.text: (In)case he slept outside and was found in two days in Valder fields (with a )mountain view
lyrics.translation: 既然他已在瓦尔德如画的山色中睡了两天，那就让他继续沉睡
